data.text: MY FIRST LANDING AT 35,72 SET ME AMIDST PLEASANT COASTAL
MADE ANOTHER LANDING AT115,41. A RATHER PLEASANT PLACE, WITH
ABUNDANT SUNLIGHT, ORANGE BUSHES, AND SOME DEEP PITS. DON'T WE
MADE MORE EQUATORIAL LANDINGS. WITH ITS PLEASANT TEMPERATURES
AND LUSH SCENERY, THIS WOULD BE AN EXCELLENT VACATION SPOT.
(EXCEPT THAT IT'S ABOUT 100000 LY FROM BALASTRACKONASTREYA)
LANDED FURTHER NORTH AT 121,30. SIMILAR TEMPERATURES, BUT DARKER
SOIL AND A MORE YELLOWISH SKY.
VEGETATION WAS MORE SPARSE AND GREENER.
